answer: The 2024 Summer Olympics were held in Paris, France, from July 26 to August 11, 2024. The event featured several sports and marked the final Olympics with the traditional modern pentathlon. The Games concluded on August 11, 2024.

results.snippet: an international multi-sport event held in France from 26 July to 11 August 2024, with several events started from 24 July.
